title: Attested enterprise release and verified local update
acceptance: CI pins third-party actions, applies least privilege and timeouts, verifies package contents, and produces checksum, SBOM, and provenance evidence.
All functional, compatibility, security, readability, and performance gates pass across the supported matrix.
Atomic commits are merged to main, remote CI is green, documentation and changelog match the implementation, and the local personal plugin is updated and byte-verified.
